_comment: I18N skeleton showing the keys each slide pattern expects. Replace _SAMPLE_ values with real content. Add or remove slides as needed. The notes object should have keys s1..sN matching the slide count.

cover.subtitle: One-sentence subtitle explaining what the deck is about.

_pattern_2col._comment: Pattern 5 (Before/After). Each side has label (mono uppercase), title (sans bold), body.
_pattern_2col.title: Slide title.

_pattern_3card._comment: Pattern 6 (3 pillars). Each card has title and body.
_pattern_3card.title: Slide title.

_pattern_4card_spectrum._comment: Pattern 7 (Four-card spectrum). Each card has label, title, body, example.
_pattern_4card_spectrum.title: Slide title.

spec.leftMsg: onde vive 90% do AI em produção

_pattern_donut._comment: Pattern 9 (Donut + 3 classes). Chart labels and 3 detailed rows.
_pattern_donut.title: Slide title.

_pattern_4layer._comment: Pattern 11 (FinOps layers). 4 numbered rows, top to bottom.
_pattern_4layer.title: Slide title.

_pattern_3phase_roadmap._comment: Pattern 12 (Roadmap). 3 phase rows with phase name, action text, duration.
_pattern_3phase_roadmap.title: Slide title.

_pattern_closing._comment: Pattern 13 (Closing). Title, tagline, contact, next step, code block.
_pattern_closing.tagline: Building the future of software development with AI and Agentic DevOps.

notes._comment: Speaker notes, one per slide. s1, s2, s3, ... up to total slide count. See references/speaker-notes.md for structure.
notes.s1:
**[ABERTURA]**
... opening sentences ...

**[NÚCLEO]**
... main content ...

**[GANCHO PROVOCATIVO]**
... provocation ...

**[TRANSIÇÃO, para slide 2, agenda]**
... handoff ...

**[TIMING]** ~2 min
